inline_comments.message: today anything put in that directory is copied to the image, there may be things that people expect to be there. Have you verified everything still works?

I compared lists of files sent from the docker build context to the built container image both ways:

First with "dot copy" taking into consideration existing ".dockerignore" file

 $ find . \
      ! -path "./docker*" \
      ! -name "Dockerfile" \
      ! -name ".dockerignore" \
      ! -path "./.git*" \
      ! -name ".gitattributes" \
      ! -name ".gitignore" \
      ! -name ".gitreview" \
      ! -path "./.idea*" \
      ! -name ".project" \
      ! -name ".pydevproject" \
 | sort

Second with explicit copy

 find ./html/ ./robot/ ./*sh | sort

Differences are:

* ./INFO.yaml
* ./LICENSE.TXT
* ./README.md
* ./red.xml
* ./vcperestcust.notes.text
* ./version.properties
